data.body: 76d2 DEPLOY progress (AWS side done): terraform apply -> 9 resources (0 changed, 0 destroyed) — API GW p38uolodo3 (https://p38uolodo3.execute-api.us-east-1.amazonaws.com), rebar-opcert-admin role, 2 SSM SecureStrings, random guard. Ed25519 key generated + seeded to SSM (version 2), pub key ...pobZZ. AC1 assertions ALL PASS after fixing (a)(b)(e)(c+d) to scope to opcert resources by address (the module is multi-API — auth_host's public $default route NONE was wrongly aggregated). Pin updated with real key + tip log position (env_id UUID kept, matches compose). Box IS SSM-managed (Online, Amazon Linux) -> deploy via SSM Run Command; nginx -s reload is graceful (bad config rejected, Gerrit protected). Amending #690 PS2 (assertion fix + real pin). NEXT: land #690 -> SSM box deploy -> live checks -> close 76d2.
